query: SELECT brand, model, modelYear, price, priceDisplay, color, mileage, displacement, transmission, fuelType, bodyType, description, features, guarantees FROM vehicles WHERE status = 'available' LIMIT 3
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user fb6ZvqfLuJXoq6N.546e92496cc7 --database YQVYVFB6KqQhPVgwGtGztr --execute SELECT brand, model, modelYear, price, priceDisplay, color, mileage, displacement, transmission, fuelType, bodyType, description, features, guarantees FROM vehicles WHERE status = 'available' LIMIT 3

rows.description: 【崑家】2015年式/BMW X1 20i/總代理/全景天窗/跑8萬7/雙電動椅
